title: 東京大賞典の後に・トップウマドル☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hi, everyooone! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Did you all like my performance of "UNLIMITED
IMPACT"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You've probably all noticed, but a tooooon of
people turned up today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And get this! A staff member told me that, if we
count everyone streaming the race, there are five
times as many spectators as last year! How
amazing is that?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And guess what else! That number is the same
amount as last year's Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Heck, this race is so packed that we've gone way,
way over Oi Racecourse's capacity!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, the staff have set up a big screen
outside...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So hello to everyone out there, too! Are you all
fired up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Awesome! ☆ We hear you guys loud and clear!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Now, last but not least...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wh-what happened? Did we lose power?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crackle...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's a video... of the student council president?!
But why?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Look!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, did you guys all—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Smart Falcon. If you are watching this
video...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid that means I am no longer a part of this
world.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That is but a joke, of course. I heard the trope is
popular these days, so I thought I would try my
hand at it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Now that you have all been put at ease,
please allow me to introduce this next video.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: On behalf of everyone present, I'd like to extend my gratitude to you for your indefatigable drive as the center of the dirt racing stage... no, of all racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a montage appears on screen tracing
the trajectory of Smart Falcon's career thus far.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text:
I never thought I'd get to see this venue so
packed ever again.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text:
These are our best numbers yet... I'm so grateful
for everything Smart Falcon has done.

text_block_list.name: Dirt Racer
text_block_list.text:
I'm always chasing after Smart Falcon, but I've
never been able to catch her.

text_block_list.name: Dirt Racer
text_block_list.text:
So I'm going to work harder, and I'm gonna be the
next center of the dirt world!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I've followed her all the way since her first
concert. Seeing my absolute fave up on such a big
stage makes me sooo happy!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Chasing after her sparkle has led me to the most
amazing places. Thank you for bringing me along
for the ride, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Is she crying?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Haha, you wish! ☆ I never cry onstage. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What? I'm teary-eyed? Well, that shouldn't be a
surprise... ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I've had this dream for such a long time.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Look around, you guys. It's so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Back at the very beginning, I didn't want to run
on dirt. But when I actually tried it, I was
enchanted by how the sand sparkled.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I came back to the dirt, again and again... and
now I'm here, sharing this incredible moment with
you all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I've dreamed of seeing this light for so long. I've always, aaaaalways wanted...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: To shine in front of the whole world!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I'm shining! Right now, I'm having the time of
my Umadol life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I owe all of you a huge thanks. You've made my
dream a reality.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you soooo much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Today wasn't the first time I sang "UNLIMITED
IMPACT." It's a song I've performed so many
times.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I've loved hearing all your passionate chants
every time... but none of them compared to
today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm sure that today's performance will literally have an unlimited impact on everyone's hearts!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm making all of you witnesses. ☆ Be sure to
remember.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's all from me. Smart Falcon, signing off from
center stage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Smart Falcon's journey to become
the top Umadol is finally com—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Waaaait just one second!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is way too quiet! We can't wrap things
up like this!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know you can do better than that! I can't hear
you!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm talking about! ☆ Now keep up
that energy...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And stuff all your feelings into your voice! Hit me
with everything you got! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This is the last one, for realsies! Let's finish the
night off with the usual chant!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone take a deep breath... and okay! Here we
go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What do you do when Falco runs?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Catch me with hearts full of love! ☆ Top Umadol
Smart Falcon, signing out!
